title: Part select can have incorrect behaviour if LSB is multiplied by a power of 2

features.name: variable part select with multiplied index
features.description: Code should include a variable part select using the +: syntax where the index expression multiplies a variable by a power of 2

features.name: shift optimization of multiplication by power of 2
features.description: Code should include an expression where a variable is multiplied by a power of 2, which can be incorrectly optimized to a left shift
